original_query: select sum(l_extendedprice) / 7.0 as avg_yearly from lineitem, part where p_partkey = l_partkey and p_brand = 'Brand#35' and p_container = 'LG PKG' and l_quantity < ( select 0.2 * avg(l_quantity) from lineitem where l_partkey = p_partkey );
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_parts AS (
    SELECT p_partkey
    FROM part
    WHERE p_brand = 'Brand#35' AND p_container = 'LG PKG'
),
part_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        l.l_partkey, 
        0.2 * AVG(l.l_quantity) AS avg_quantity 
    FROM lineitem l
    JOIN filtered_parts fp ON l.l_partkey = fp.p_partkey
    GROUP BY l.l_partkey
)
SELECT SUM(li.l_extendedprice) / 7.0 AS avg_yearly
FROM lineitem li
JOIN filtered_parts fp ON li.l_partkey = fp.p_partkey
JOIN part_avg pa ON li.l_partkey = pa.l_partkey
WHERE li.l_quantity < pa.avg_quantity;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Replaced correlated subquery with CTEs to avoid repeated execution of the subquery for each row
Used filtered_parts CTE to filter the part table once and reuse the results
Replaced IN subquery with JOIN in the part_avg CTE for better performance
